freebusy_check.rationale: Availability-only operation; no event detail or mutation required.

query_agenda.rationale: Read event details from accessible calendars without edit permission.

create_event.rationale: Create and edit events on accessible calendars.

update_event.rationale: Modify existing events on accessible calendars.

app_created_calendar_event.rationale: Manage secondary calendars and events created by the app only.
